title: DEVELOPMENTAL SCREENING QUESTIONNAIRES - 211info
text: OREGON SCREENING PROJECT DEVELOPMENTAL SCREENING QUESTIONNAIRES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Confidential website where parents and caregivers can check a child’s development by completing an online questionnaire. No personal identifying information is required. Results letters, completed questionnaires, learning activities, follow-up resources, parenting materials, and community referrals are available by email or download. The site also provides contact information for Oregon Early Intervention providers and a Developmental Screening Toolkit for professionals who support families. A project coordinator monitors the site daily and is available to parents, caregivers, and providers by phone or email. Website Eligibility: Parents and primary caregivers of children ages 1 month-6 years Hours: Not applicable Email (541) 346-2580 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 346-2580 Main phone Main phone (541) 346-2580 Kimberly Murphy [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays Pediatric Developmental Screening Specialized Information and Referral * Disabilities Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON SCREENING PROJECT
